title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull, bundle, and run GGUF models locally with a built-in OpenAI-compatible server.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama HTTP API (browser & Node).

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama HTTP API with sync & async support.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: Official Docker image that bundles the Ollama server and CLI for CPU/GPU inference.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration allowing any Ollama model to be used as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that connects to any local Ollama instance.

title: ollama4j/ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and fluent API.

title: ollama-rust/ollama-rs
summary: Lightweight async Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-csharp/ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-hass/ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom component exposing Ollama models as conversation agents.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-use Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama, WebUI, and GPU support.

title: ollama-helm/ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-nvidia-ollama
summary: Official documentation on enabling CUDA and ROCm acceleration inside Ollama containers.

title: ollama-models/ollama-models
summary: Curated collection of GGUF model definitions (Modelfiles) maintained by the Ollama team.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama responses into Discord threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Bolt-js Slack bot that lets users chat with local Ollama models in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-obsidian-plugin
summary: Obsidian community plugin that brings local LLM completion to the editor via Ollama.

title: ollama-vscode-extension
summary: VS Code extension adding inline code generation and chat sidebar powered by Ollama.
